title: I have a group that has no items saying it has subitems - how can I see them?
excerpt:
For some reason the top group on my board says it has subitems even though it doesn’t have any items in it. 
  
As such, I’m unable to view the subitems and have no idea how to see them to be able to delete/deal with the…

posts.author: francisatexago (Francis Frizelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
For some reason the top group on my board says it has subitems even though it doesn’t have any items in it.

Screenshot 2024-07-22 163245705×463 24.7 KB

As such, I’m unable to view the subitems and have no idea how to see them to be able to delete/deal with them.

Any ideas on how I can find them and change this?

Thanks

posts.author: francisatexago (Francis Frizelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Nevermind, I booted up Monday the next day and found it wasn’t displaying the mystery subitems there anymore.

I suppose I should have started with the tried-and-tested “turn it off and on again”.

Thanks
